title: Chicken Etouffee
ingredients: ½ cup chopped green bell pepper
2 teaspoons Cajun seasoning (more or less to taste)
instructions: Heat oil in a heavy kettle over medium heat.
Stir in flour and cook, stirring constantly, until the roux turns a dark red-brown color, about 10 minutes.
Add onion, celery, and bell pepper and cook about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook 1 minute more.
Stir in tomatoes, clam juice, Cajun seasoning, and chicken.
Remove from heat and stir in parsley.
notes: Season the rice cooking water with a small amount of Cajun seasoning (optional).
This recipe was often served on Halloween night!
